_meta.description: MFS (Manufacturer Fingerprint Schema) Unified Database - Aggregated from 10+ sources

fields.driverHint: Suggested driver class for this device
fields.deviceType: Semantic device type (switch, sensor, light, etc.)
fields.sources: Array of source objects providing evidence for this fingerprint
fields.confidence: 0.0-1.0 confidence score based on number of agreeing sources
fields.variants: Array of known Tuya variant prefixes (_TZE200_, _TZE204_, _TZ3000_, etc.)
fields.capabilities: Suggested Homey capabilities for this device type
fields.lastSeen: ISO timestamp of last successful fetch

local.name: Local driver.compose.json
local.description: Extracted from existing drivers in the repository

smartthings.description: SmartThings Zigbee device profiles and fingerprints

domoticz.name: Domoticz Zigbee
domoticz.description: Domoticz Zigbee hardware plugin device list

zigpy.description: zigpy low-level Zigbee library device database

community.name: Community Issues & PRs
community.description: Fingerprints submitted via GitHub issues and pull requests
